texts: View of pilgrims on penitential beds and performing water station

elements.name: Abstract
texts: Robert French was the chief photographer responsible for photographing three quarters of the Lawrence Collection. For more information, see the Dictionary of Irish Biography: http://dib.cambridge.org/viewReadPage.do?articleId=a3369
